reviews.review_description: This is my first review ever and I can say that this game is very enjoyable and it keeps u coming back for more. It has plenty of replay of course if your trying to beat scores I love it the only thing it needs is more environments other than that it’s cool so if ur looking for a good card game to waste time this is it u can’t go wrong 😃
I didn't think I'd like this game as much as i do.  Worth checking out.  SInce I purchased it, I've popped in a few times randomly to play quick games.  Def. a good buy in my book.

Very addictive i'll just play a few games of this next thing an hour has past, nice environment to start off with, would like too see more to choose from in the future, in game music was a little annoying but was able to switch it off In the options, good to see you can load your own music files as an optional. Another idea for future updates add a basic Web browser for YouTube music streaming like in real vr fishing and add in classic solitaire for variety. But all in all very positive game design and for the price you can't go wrong.
As someone who loves tripeaks on my phone this is amazing. A nice and relaxing game and cheap as chip's.
what can i say? No more nausea in VR and my wife loved it. Thank you

Just played it a few rounds and like it so far. The livingroom environment and cards are nice and the gameplay is fun. Would be nice to be able to choose between a few background music files. Needs a bit more polish but overall a very nice game ! Thank you !

I got the key from the dev, so thanks! I came in blind, so I booted it up and thought: oh, nice environment, but cards? Thats it? Ok, I’ll give it one go… And after 10+ times going „ok, one last time” it’s safe to say this game is addicting and awesome! 5stars, great work!
Just had a first play, very impressed nice chilled out gameplay and excellent sharp graphics on the quest 2

After a long day of tons of thinking and brainstorming for my job, this is my go-to game. It’s relaxing. It’s light. And it just works. I can have my music playing in the background. 

I just wish that the developers could let players adjust their own card height and table height. Currently, it’s a little too low for my liking. Otherwise, it’s a really great relaxing game.￼￼

Not bad at all. I was pleasantly surprised by this one. You are playing some version of solataire that I’ve never played before but was easy to pick up. This is the ultimate casual game set in a very realistic looking room. You can play your own music. If you are looking for a “VR” game then this may NOT be what you’re looking for. But if you want to take advantage of virtual reality’s ability to place yourself in a distraction free environment to really delve into a card game then you’ll love this. Also, it’s at a perfect price point. It’s not asking for too much. It’s more of showing your appreciation for the developer. Worth the price.

reviews.review_title: Simple and 'just one more level' feel
reviews.review_description: Simple and small game, but great to play, especially for the price. Environment is very pleasant and the interface is easy to use. Excellent feature to be able to play your own music which I really think makes the game. Definitely has that 'just one more level' feel to it

I’m not a huge Solitaire aficionado, soI wasn’t familiar with Tripeaks as a style of the game. This isn’t classic Solitaire, rather you deal down into a single deck and try to clear three “peaks” of cards. Still its an enjoyable way to pass anywhere from 5 minutes to an hour, though I couldn’t see myself playing longer sessions than that. The ability to play your own music is a Huge + so good on the Dev for that!

I love Tripeaks Solitaire and was thrilled to find it in The App Lab and for a great price. I’m hoping the Developers haven’t given up on this game. 
A couple issues I have and I’m not sure if I am overlooking something. 

      1). When I want to go in to just play a few rounds, I can’t go out unless I have lost the game, which can be after many levels. The only way I can see how to get out is to quit. I’d rather go back out to the main screen. 
      2.) I have played all 150 levels and want to replay again. There isn’t any way to clear it out and restart a new game. I tried deleting the app and re-installing it, but that didn’t work. I had to set the level to hard and lose every game, which was extremely time consuming. 

Please correct me if I’m not seeing how to fix those issues. If it’s my error I will definitely change the rating to 5 stars. 

I would pay to have some different card back (and front) selections and more levels. 

I haven’t figured out how to add music, mainly because I can’t figure out how to bring it into the Quest. Others make it seem easy. 🤔 The music playing is somewhat calming and the room setting is nice. I like the effects when you win or lose a game. 👏🏼

I agree with others on the table being too low. I have tried everything in the Quest to try to bring it higher. Having neck issues, it’s painful after a few minutes to have to look down so I have to stop. 

Other than that, Kudos! 🙂

Simple tri-peaks style solitaire game. Gameplay is smooth and intuitive. Lots of different levels with unique layouts to progress through. Nice looking livingroom environment. And you can add your own music.

Some features you might expect that I didn't find: no option for random deck/multiple deals, no visual customization (environments, card styles), can't jump to/find yourself among the high scores.

An interesting question is, does the VR medium add anything to tri-peaks solitaire over playing on a flat screen? In terms of gameplay, no. However, if you want to block out the outside world (no phone notifications, no annoying roommates, no noisy kids, maybe you're on a plane) this could be a great way to relax, especially with the option for your own music.
The game has excellent graphics and functions impeccably. I would like to install my own music but Tripeaks does Not have a music folder and your link to Discord has expired.
Very addictive.  Played this on the GO   Very good graphics and such a bargain price.
It's a solitaire style game that surrounds you as you play.   Slightly different than your average solitaire game.

included in this video - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v-5q5Zx7n3E

A beautiful environment and the ability to add your own music really makes this instantly something to take a second look at. The biggest concern is if you like Tripeaks solitaire as this is not the traditional card game that I played when I was younger. Everything about this game is hugely polished and the visuals look great, the cards are very high resolution and its a sharp looking game in the headset. I think it comes down to if you like Tripeaks solitaire or card games in general but if you do, this is a fantastic title.
Great graphics and good gameplay. Worth the money! Easily hours of play fun!
I love spending time on this app ,it's so chilled out but would love to add my own music to it ,that said it's still worth a solid 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Hi riverdance48,
thanks for the kind words! If you have problems to use your own music ingame or dont know how to set it up, please join the discord (https://discord.gg/tNAsJzz6) and I am happy to help you.
